content.claim: Age-structure divergence is acute and geographically clustered: 91 municipalities have average age under 35, while 42 municipalities have average age above 50 (primarily in Vas and Zala counties). The share of Hungarians under age 18 fell from 18% (2010) to 16% (2020).
content.context: Fresh live research through the Demography lens
limitations: Data are from 2010–2020; more recent cohort projections needed to forecast primary-school-age children (6–14) over next planning horizon
Does not specify correlation between municipality average age and primary-school enrollment thresholds
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
